headline: Is Darden Restaurants, Inc. (DRI) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: We came across a bullish thesis on Darden Restaurants, Inc. on Compounding Quality’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on DRI. Darden Restaurants, Inc.’s share was trading at $203.41 as of March 4th. DRI’s trailing and forward P/E were 22.08 and 18.48, respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Darden Restaurants, Inc.
